name: Oretika Me Avga Ke Tyri (Egg & Cheese Puffs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs well.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add parsley to the egg mixture.
4. Gradually add the cubed cheese to the egg mixture.
5. Mix everything until fully combined.
6. Heat butter in a frying pan over medium heat.
7. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot butter.
8. Fry the puffs, turning them carefully with a slotted spoon without piercing.
9. Cook until they are lightly brown on all sides.
10. Remove from the frying pan and drain on absorbent paper.
11. Serve hot.
